name: Smartcat
description: Smartcat is a translation management platform combining human translators, AI translation, and translation memories. Use this API to create and manage translation projects, upload documents for translation, track progress, download completed translations, manage translation memories and glossaries, configure machine translation engines, and manage team assignments.

auth.note: Use HTTP Basic auth with your account ID as the username and API key as the password. The header value is 'Basic {base64(accountId:apiKey)}'. Obtain credentials from Settings > API in Smartcat.

capabilities.name: project_create
capabilities.description: Create a new translation project with source and target languages, workflow, and settings.

capabilities.name: project_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific translation project by its ID.

capabilities.name: project_list
capabilities.description: List all translation projects in the account.

capabilities.name: project_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing project's name, deadline, and other settings.

capabilities.name: project_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a translation project and its associated data.

capabilities.name: project_complete
capabilities.description: Mark a translation project as complete.

capabilities.name: project_statistics_get
capabilities.description: Get word count and translation memory match statistics for a project.

capabilities.name: document_upload
capabilities.description: Upload one or more documents to an existing translation project.

capabilities.name: document_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and status of a specific document in a project.

capabilities.name: document_update
capabilities.description: Update/replace a document file in an existing project.

capabilities.name: document_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more documents from a project.

capabilities.name: document_export
capabilities.description: Export (download) translated or source documents from a project.

capabilities.name: document_statistics_get
capabilities.description: Get word count statistics for a specific document.

capabilities.name: translation_memories_list
capabilities.description: List all translation memories available in the account.

capabilities.name: project_translation_memories_get
capabilities.description: Get translation memories attached to a specific project.

capabilities.name: project_translation_memories_update
capabilities.description: Set or update translation memories for a project with match thresholds.

capabilities.name: glossaries_list
capabilities.description: List all glossaries available in the account.

capabilities.name: project_glossaries_update
capabilities.description: Set or update glossaries assigned to a project.

capabilities.name: formats_list
capabilities.description: List all supported file formats for document translation.

capabilities.name: team_search
capabilities.description: Search team members in the account for task assignment.
